features.description: Establish the site development workflow contract, including the repository role boundary, workflow state files, and the verification entrypoint.
Add repository contract tests that protect the Obsidian-to-Hugo publishing boundary and the Selected summary CSS regression.
Document the workflow-driven requirement, planning, coding, and evaluation loop for future site changes.
Update the Projects page Gentle Memories entry to show community review approval and link to the public Obsidian review page.
Refine article code block rendering with GitHub-style syntax highlighting, readable typography, hidden text labels, and inline-code-matched block backgrounds.
Refresh the public About and Resume pages with resume-informed professional copy, privacy-safe public profile content, and code-block-aligned terminal styling.
Add giscus-powered article comments backed by GitHub Discussions, with reactions enabled and post-page rendering covered by tests.
Add site-hosted custom giscus themes so the comment iframe background matches the site's light and dark palettes.
Add a lightweight selection-to-comment flow that copies selected article text as a Markdown quote and scrolls readers to giscus comments.
Add an English and Simplified Chinese Hugo site shell with preserved English URLs, a translation-aware language switch, localized interface copy, and bilingual build coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Existing English pages remain at their current root-relative URLs while the Chinese site is generated under /zh/.
Every rendered page exposes an English/Chinese language switch that targets the paired translation when available and the target-language homepage otherwise.
Homepage, lists, posts, taxonomies, series navigation, table of contents, comments, dates, counts, and empty states use localized interface strings.
Translated pages and language homepages emit correct alternate-language metadata without client-side redirects.
Automated tests and the production Hugo build verify both language outputs without modifying generated article content.

features.description: Add a versioned Obsidian localization publisher runtime with a supported CLI launcher, installer, structured status, single-run locking, explicit timeouts, and resumable long-document chunks.
acceptance_criteria: The canonical publisher implementation is versioned under tools/obsidian-publisher and installs deterministically into the configured vault.
The supported launcher resolves and executes the QuickAdd choice by command ID, verifies that status changes, and never uses an obsidian://quickadd URL.
A run records a single-run lock plus stage, chunk, total chunks, timestamps, script version, and source hash, and stale runs can be recovered safely.
AI calls have explicit timeouts and completed edit/review chunks are cached for resume.

features.description: Document the localization publishing runbook, the July 2026 incident, and mandatory agent entrypoints without duplicating operational truth.
Add automated publisher regression tests and fixtures for fenced code, technical headings, long-document chunking, locks, idempotency, and installed-artifact parity.
Preserve factual-review title and heading corrections while restoring protected Markdown artifacts.
acceptance_criteria: A consistency-review heading correction remains in the final localized document.
Protected non-text fenced blocks are restored byte-for-byte after review.
The affected article can resume from the cached edited stage and regenerate only review output.

features.description: Disable periodic GitHub Publisher pushes and make publisher doctor reject configurations that bypass human draft approval.
acceptance_criteria: The vault GitHub Publisher configuration uses syncInterval 0.
Publisher doctor fails when periodic push is enabled.
The Runbook and AGENTS rules preserve explicit approval before GitHub synchronization.

features.description: Add a shared localization terminology contract and use 控制面 consistently for control plane.
acceptance_criteria: Rewrite, edit, and consistency-review stages receive the same versioned terminology constraints.
The pipeline rejects 控制平面 when the source uses control plane and requires 控制面.
The repository and installed Obsidian terminology artifacts have matching hashes.
The reviewed Part 2 Chinese draft and its resumable cache use 控制面 consistently without changing Markdown structure.

features.description: Version all localization prompts, install them into Obsidian with parity checks, and repair stale workflow progress.
acceptance_criteria: All six active localization prompts are canonical files under tools/obsidian-publisher/prompts.
The installer copies every canonical prompt into the vault and records prompt hashes in its manifest.
Publisher doctor and automated tests fail when an installed prompt differs from its canonical source.
The Runbook and vault README describe repository prompts as canonical.
progress.md records that Remote Agent Workflow Part 2 is published and no longer awaits approval.
